# Source passage

Our system reports a mean latency of 11.8 ms on an A100 at batch size 32, compared with 14.6 ms for the supplied baseline under the same stated setup (Table~\ref{tab:latency}; \cite{lee2025system}). This comparison is repeated here because latency is an important practical consideration. The latency comparison indicates an advantage in this setup, although the evaluation covers English queries only and does not establish behavior for other languages. The same 11.8 ms and 14.6 ms comparison is mentioned again to emphasize the result. \label{sec:efficiency}
